title: VEC-108 Friend's mother Hina Akiyoshi
overview: Hina, a mother who lost her husband two years ago and lives with her son. I moved a lot because of my work, so my son couldn't make friends. One day my son brought a friend named Yuji home. I am pleased that my son has made friends, but Yuji is lustful for Hina's beauty and erotic body, and commits in a place that my son does not notice ● Re ... Yuji who does not resist for his son becomes radical ….
